testCase.name: GameSessionService should publish lifecycle events for create and move
createGame should create a new game with initial position by default
createGame should create a game from a valid FEN
createGame should return Left for an invalid FEN
createGame should generate unique IDs for multiple games
getGame should return Some for an existing game
getGame should return None for an unknown game ID
deleteGame should return true and remove the game
deleteGame should return false for an unknown game ID
getGameState should return FEN, PGN, and status for an existing game
getGameState should return None for an unknown game
makeMove should apply a valid move and return new FEN
makeMove should return Left for an invalid move
makeMove should return Left for an unknown game
makeMove should report check event
makeMove should report checkmate event
makeMove should report stalemate event
makeMove should report threefold_repetition event
getMoveHistory should return empty vector for a new game
getMoveHistory should return moves after playing
getMoveHistory should return None for unknown game
getFen should return FEN for existing game
getFen should return None for unknown game
loadFen should load a valid FEN into an existing game
loadFen should return Left for invalid FEN
loadFen should return Left for unknown game
OpeningParser.parseTsvLine should parse a valid Lichess TSV line
OpeningParser.parseTsvLine should parse a multi-move opening
OpeningParser.parseTsvLine should skip header line
OpeningParser.parseTsvLine should return None for malformed line
OpeningParser.parseTsvLine should return None for empty fields
OpeningParser.parseTsvLine should handle unrecognized PGN gracefully
OpeningParser.computeFenAndMoveCount should compute FEN for initial pawn push
OpeningParser.computeFenAndMoveCount should compute correct move count for multi-move PGN
OpeningParser.computeFenAndMoveCount should handle unrecognized PGN moves gracefully
OpeningParser.parseLichessOpenings should parse all Lichess TSV files from resources
OpeningParser.parseLichessOpenings should produce openings with valid ECO codes
OpeningParser.parseLichessOpenings should cover all five ECO categories
OpeningParser.parseLichessOpenings should produce unique (eco, name) pairs
OpeningParser.parseTsvResource should parse a bundled TSV file
OpeningParser.parseTsvResource should fail when the resource does not exist
OpeningParser.parseCsvResource should parse the legacy CSV resource
OpeningParser.parseCsvResource should parse an empty CSV resource into an empty list
OpeningParser.parseCsvOpenings should skip the header and parse valid rows
OpeningParser.parseCsvOpenings should discard malformed and invalid rows
OpeningParser.validateOpenings should return no errors for the parsed Lichess dataset
OpeningParser.validateOpenings should report duplicate (eco, name) pairs
OpeningParser.validateOpenings should report invalid ECO format
OpeningParser.validateOpenings should report empty name
OpeningParser.validateOpenings should report unreasonable move count (0)
OpeningParser.validateOpenings should report unreasonable move count (> 50)
OpeningParser.printStatistics should handle empty openings list
OpeningParser.printStatistics should print stats for a non-empty list
OpeningParser.deduplicate should keep the entry with fewer moves when duplicates exist
OpeningParser.deduplicate should sort results by (eco, name)
PuzzleParser.parseLine should parse a valid CSV line into a Puzzle
PuzzleParser.parseLine should return None for a line with too few fields
PuzzleParser.parseLine should return None for a line with a non-integer rating field
PuzzleParser.parseLine should handle an empty themes field
PuzzleParser.parseLine should populate openingTags when a 10th field is present
PuzzleParser.parseLine should return Nil for openingTags when the 10th field is absent
PuzzleParser.fromResource should return an empty vector for a non-existent resource
PuzzleParser.fromResource should load puzzles from the bundled resource
GameController should announce the initial board to observers
GameController should update its internal board and notify observers when applying a move
GameController should track whose turn it is
GameController should apply PGN moves successfully
GameController should return error for invalid PGN moves
GameController should apply coordinate moves successfully
GameController should return Failed for invalid coordinate moves
GameController should prevent moving opponent's pieces
GameController should execute a sequence of PGN moves
GameController should load a position from FEN notation
GameController should return error for invalid FEN
GameController should get current board position as FEN
GameController should get FEN after making moves
GameController should return Failed when piece exists but move is invalid
GameController should return Failed when PGN parses but Board rejects the move
GameController should report activeColor as White initially
GameController should report activeColor as Black after one move
GameController should report not in check for initial position
GameController should report not checkmate for initial position
GameController should report not stalemate for initial position
GameController should report correct gameStatus for initial position
GameController should report check via gameStatus
GameController should report checkmate via gameStatus
GameController should report stalemate via gameStatus
GameController should report threefold repetition via gameStatus after position repeated 3 times
GameController should wouldBeThirdRepetition returns true after 7 plies (one ply short of threefold)
GameController should wouldBeThirdRepetition returns false for a fresh position
GameController should track board states in history
GameController should generate PGN text from move history
GameController should record PGN for coordinate moves
GameController should navigate backward through history
GameController should not navigate backward past the initial position
GameController should navigate forward through history
GameController should not navigate forward past the latest position
GameController should jump directly to any position with goToMove
GameController should ignore goToMove with out-of-range index
GameController should notify observer when goToMove is called
GameController should reject moves when not at the latest position
GameController should reset history on announceInitial
GameController should reset history on loadFromFEN
GameController should undo the last move
GameController should undo multiple moves
GameController should not undo past the initial position
GameController should redo a previously undone move
GameController should redo multiple moves
GameController should not redo when redo buffer is empty
GameController should clear redo buffer when a new move is made
GameController should clear redo buffer on announceInitial
GameController should clear redo buffer on loadFromFEN
GameController should report canUndo correctly
GameController should notify observers on undo
GameController should notify observers on redo
GameController should undo jumps to latest if navigated backward
GameController.loadPgnMoves should load a sequence of PGN moves with move numbers
GameController.loadPgnMoves should load moves without move numbers
GameController.loadPgnMoves should strip comments and results
GameController.loadPgnMoves should strip variations in parentheses
GameController.loadPgnMoves should return Left on empty input
GameController.loadPgnMoves should return Left on input with only move numbers and results
GameController.loadPgnMoves should return Left on invalid move
GameController.loadPgnMoves should reset board to initial before applying moves
GameController.loadPgnMoves should allow navigation after loading
GameController.loadPgnMoves should handle result markers *
GameController.loadPgnMoves should propagate first error when multiple moves follow a bad one
OpeningBookStrategy should select an opening on White's first move
OpeningBookStrategy should play White's first book move on the initial board
OpeningBookStrategy should play the full book for both colors in computer-vs-computer mode
OpeningBookStrategy should fall back to the engine after White's book moves are exhausted
OpeningBookStrategy should abandon the book and fall back when a book move is illegal on the current board
OpeningBookStrategy should not select an opening when the pool is empty
OpeningBookStrategy should reset state so a new opening is selected on next White move
OpeningBookStrategy should name includes the opening ECO and name after selection
OpeningBookStrategy should work correctly with the full Lichess library
OpeningContinuationStrategy should play the deepest documented continuation from the current position
OpeningContinuationStrategy should continue following documented opening moves for both colors as long as the line matches
OpeningContinuationStrategy should use a documented black move from the opening database after white's first move
OpeningContinuationStrategy should fall back once the position is no longer covered by a documented continuation
OpeningContinuationStrategy should use another documented line after the opponent deviates from one opening into a different known opening
OpeningContinuationStrategy should default to iterative deepening once the opening path ends
Evaluator.evaluate should return 0 for the initial symmetric position
Evaluator.evaluate should be negated when color flips on the initial position
Evaluator.evaluate should return positive score when White has extra material
Evaluator.pstBonus should return the pawn table value for a white pawn on e4
Evaluator.pstBonus should mirror for Black: pawn on e5 should equal white pawn on e4
Evaluator.pstBonus should return knight table value
Evaluator.pstBonus should return bishop table value
Evaluator.pstBonus should return rook table value
Evaluator.pstBonus should return queen table value
Evaluator.pstBonus should return king table value
Evaluator.materialValue should return expected centipawn values
MoveStrategy.promotionFor should return Some(Queen) when a white pawn reaches rank 8
MoveStrategy.promotionFor should return Some(Queen) when a black pawn reaches rank 1
MoveStrategy.promotionFor should return None for a non-promoting pawn move
MoveStrategy.promotionFor should return None when the square has no piece
ComputerPlayer should delegate to its strategy
ComputerPlayer should use RandomStrategy by default
ComputerPlayer should allow strategy to be swapped at runtime
ComputerPlayer should return None when there are no legal moves
ComputerPlayer should not trigger repetition avoidance when not ahead in material
ComputerPlayer should return candidate when ahead but candidate does not repeat
ComputerPlayer should fall back to candidate when ahead but all moves repeat
ComputerPlayer should choose a non-repeating alternative when ahead and candidate repeats
RandomStrategy should always return a legal move from the initial position
RandomStrategy should return None when no legal moves exist
GreedyStrategy should have the correct name
GreedyStrategy should capture a hanging queen when available
GreedyStrategy should prefer a rook capture over quiet moves
GreedyStrategy should prefer a bishop capture over quiet moves
GreedyStrategy should prefer a pawn capture over quiet moves
GreedyStrategy should prefer a knight capture over quiet moves
GreedyStrategy should return a move when only quiet moves are available
GreedyStrategy should return None when no legal moves exist
MaterialBalanceStrategy should have the correct name
MaterialBalanceStrategy should capture a hanging queen when available
MaterialBalanceStrategy should return a move from the initial position
MaterialBalanceStrategy should return None when no legal moves exist
PieceSquareStrategy should have the correct name
PieceSquareStrategy should return a move from the initial position
PieceSquareStrategy should return None when no legal moves exist
MinimaxStrategy should have the correct name
MinimaxStrategy should use default depth 3
MinimaxStrategy should return a move from the initial position
MinimaxStrategy should return None when no legal moves exist
MinimaxStrategy should find a winning move when available (depth 2)
MinimaxStrategy should detect checkmate in 1 (exercises terminal-node path in alphaBeta)
MinimaxStrategy should evaluate stalemate correctly in alphaBeta
MinimaxStrategy should cover maximizing=true recursive branch (depth 3)
MinimaxStrategy should score opponent checkmate in minimizing branch (depth 2)
QuiescenceStrategy should have the correct name
QuiescenceStrategy should use default depth and qDepth
QuiescenceStrategy should return a move from the initial position
QuiescenceStrategy should return None when no legal moves exist
QuiescenceStrategy should capture a hanging queen (depth 2)
QuiescenceStrategy should detect checkmate in 1 (exercises terminal-node path in alphaBeta)
QuiescenceStrategy should evaluate stalemate line in alphaBeta
QuiescenceStrategy should cover maximizing=true recursive branch (depth 3)
IterativeDeepeningStrategy should have the correct name
IterativeDeepeningStrategy should use default time limit of 2000ms
IterativeDeepeningStrategy should allow time limit to be changed
IterativeDeepeningStrategy should return a legal move from the initial position
IterativeDeepeningStrategy should return None when no legal moves exist
IterativeDeepeningStrategy should capture a hanging queen (finds winning move)
IterativeDeepeningStrategy should return a move even with a very short time limit (depth-0 fallback)
IterativeDeepeningStrategy should detect checkmate in 1 at searchAtDepth level
IterativeDeepeningStrategy should handle stalemate at searchAtDepth level
IterativeDeepeningStrategy should exercise maximizing=true in alphaBeta (depth 3)
IterativeDeepeningStrategy should score opponent checkmate in minimizing branch (depth 2)
Board.move with promotion should require a promotion piece when white pawn reaches rank 8
Board.move with promotion should require a promotion piece when black pawn reaches rank 1
Board.move with promotion should promote white pawn to Queen
Board.move with promotion should promote white pawn to Rook
Board.move with promotion should promote white pawn to Bishop
Board.move with promotion should promote white pawn to Knight
Board.move with promotion should promote black pawn to Queen
Board.move with promotion should allow promotion capture — pawn takes on back rank
Board.move with promotion should count promoted piece in legalMoves (promotion moves are legal)
GameController.applyPgnMove with promotion should apply promotion from PGN e8=Q
GameController.applyPgnMove with promotion should apply promotion from PGN e8=R
GameController.applyPgnMove with promotion should apply promotion from PGN e8=B
GameController.applyPgnMove with promotion should apply promotion from PGN e8=N
GameController.applyPgnMove with promotion should fail with PromotionRequired when PGN has no promotion piece
GameController.applyPgnMove with promotion should record promotion notation in pgnMoves (may include check symbol)
GameController.applyPgnMove with promotion should record promotion to Rook in pgnMoves
GameController.applyPgnMove with promotion should apply black pawn promotion from PGN d1=Q
GameController.applyMove with promotion should apply promotion via coordinate move with promotion piece
GameController.applyMove with promotion should fail with PromotionRequired via coordinate move without promotion piece
Observable should notify a single observer
Observable should notify multiple observers
Observable should stop notifying a removed observer
Observable should not fail when removing an observer that was never added
Observable should not fail when notifying with no observers
CombinatorFenParser.parseFEN with full FEN should parse castling rights from a full FEN
CombinatorFenParser.parseFEN with full FEN should parse partial castling rights
CombinatorFenParser.parseFEN with full FEN should parse no castling rights (dash)
CombinatorFenParser.parseFEN with full FEN should set lastMove from en passant field (white to move)
CombinatorFenParser.parseFEN with full FEN should set lastMove from en passant field (black to move)
CombinatorFenParser.parseFEN with full FEN should leave lastMove as None when en passant field is dash
CombinatorFenParser.parseFEN with full FEN should succeed on board-only FEN (no trailing fields)
CombinatorFenParser.parseFEN with full FEN should succeed when castling and en passant fields are absent
CombinatorFenParser.parseFEN with full FEN should fail on completely invalid input
CombinatorFenParser.parseFullFEN should parse the starting position
CombinatorFenParser.parseFullFEN should parse black to move
CombinatorFenParser.parseFullFEN should parse halfmove clock and fullmove number
CombinatorFenParser.parseFullFEN should default to white to move when side field is missing
CombinatorFenParser.parseFullFEN should default halfmove clock to 0 when missing
CombinatorFenParser.parseFullFEN should default fullmove number to 1 when missing
CombinatorFenParser.parseFullFEN should clamp negative halfmove clock to 0
CombinatorFenParser.parseFullFEN should clamp fullmove number below 1 to 1
CombinatorFenParser.parseFullFEN should produce a round-trippable state via FullFen.render
CombinatorFenParser.parseFullFEN should fail on completely invalid input
CombinatorFenParser should parse the initial position
CombinatorFenParser should parse a position with empty squares
CombinatorFenParser should parse a position after e4
CombinatorFenParser should parse a position after e4 e5
CombinatorFenParser should parse a complex middlegame position
CombinatorFenParser should parse all piece types
CombinatorFenParser should fail on invalid FEN with wrong rank count
CombinatorFenParser should fail on invalid FEN with wrong square count in rank
CombinatorFenParser should fail on invalid piece character
CombinatorFenParser should convert board to FEN notation
CombinatorFenParser should round-trip FEN: parse and convert back
CombinatorFenParser should handle FEN with multiple consecutive empty squares
CombinatorFenParser should parse FEN with extra whitespace and components
CombinatorFenParser should fail on invalid piece character in FEN
CombinatorFenParser should fail on empty FEN string
CombinatorFenParser should produce the same Board as RegexFenParser for initial position
CombinatorFenParser should produce the same Board as RegexFenParser for complex position
CombinatorFenParser as FenIO should save a board as FEN
CombinatorFenParser as FenIO should load a board from FEN
CombinatorFenParser as FenIO should round-trip through save and load
CombinatorFenParser as FenIO should fail to load invalid FEN
CombinatorFenParser as FenIO should be usable polymorphically as FenIO
CombinatorFenParser as FenIO should be usable polymorphically as FileIO
FastParseFenParser.parseFEN with full FEN should parse castling rights from a full FEN
FastParseFenParser.parseFEN with full FEN should parse partial castling rights
FastParseFenParser.parseFEN with full FEN should parse no castling rights (dash)
FastParseFenParser.parseFEN with full FEN should set lastMove from en passant field (white to move)
FastParseFenParser.parseFEN with full FEN should set lastMove from en passant field (black to move)
FastParseFenParser.parseFEN with full FEN should leave lastMove as None when en passant field is dash

FastParseFenParser.parseFEN with full FEN should succeed when castling and en passant fields are absent

FastParseFenParser.parseFullFEN should clamp fullmove number below 1 to 1

FastParseFenParser should fail on empty FEN string

FastParseFenParser as FenIO should save a board as FEN
FastParseFenParser as FenIO should load a board from FEN
FastParseFenParser as FenIO should round-trip through save and load
FastParseFenParser as FenIO should fail to load invalid FEN
FastParseFenParser as FenIO should be usable polymorphically as FenIO
FastParseFenParser as FenIO should be usable polymorphically as FileIO
RegexFenParser as FenIO should round-trip the initial board
RegexFenParser as FenIO should save produces valid FEN
RegexFenParser as FenIO should load parses valid FEN
RegexFenParser as FenIO should load fails on invalid FEN
RegexFenParser as FenIO should load fails on empty string
RegexFenParser as FenIO should be usable through the FileIO interface
RegexFenParser as FenIO should round-trip a position after moves
FullFen.parse should parse the starting position
FullFen.parse should parse black to move
FullFen.parse should parse halfmove clock and fullmove number
FullFen.parse should default to white to move when side field is missing
FullFen.parse should default halfmove clock to 0 when missing
FullFen.parse should default fullmove number to 1 when missing
FullFen.parse should clamp negative halfmove clock to 0
FullFen.parse should clamp fullmove number below 1 to 1
FullFen.parse should fail on completely invalid FEN
FullFen.render should render the starting position
FullFen.render should render black to move
FullFen.render should clamp negative halfmove clock to 0 in render
FullFen.render should clamp fullmove number below 1 to 1 in render
FullFen.render should produce a round-trippable FEN
FullFen.openingKey should return the first 4 space-separated fields
FullFen.openingKey should not include halfmove clock or fullmove number
FullFen.openingKey should differ by active color
FullFen.parseCastling should parse full castling rights
FullFen.parseCastling should parse no castling rights from dash
FullFen.parseCastling should parse no castling rights from empty string
FullFen.parseCastling should parse partial castling rights (white only)
FullFen.parseCastling should parse partial castling rights (kingside only)
FullFen.parseEnPassantTarget should return None for dash
FullFen.parseEnPassantTarget should return None for empty string
FullFen.parseEnPassantTarget should return correct squares for white to move (en passant on rank 6)
FullFen.parseEnPassantTarget should return None for white to move but wrong rank (rank 3)
FullFen.parseEnPassantTarget should return correct squares for black to move (en passant on rank 3)
FullFen.parseEnPassantTarget should return None for black to move but wrong rank (rank 6)
FullFen.parseEnPassantTarget should return None for invalid square string
FullFen.renderEnPassant should render dash when no last move
FullFen.renderEnPassant should render en passant target square after a white pawn double push
FullFen.renderEnPassant should render en passant target square after a black pawn double push
FullFen.renderEnPassant should render dash after a non-double pawn push
RegexFenParser.parseFEN with full FEN should parse castling rights from a full FEN
RegexFenParser.parseFEN with full FEN should parse partial castling rights
RegexFenParser.parseFEN with full FEN should parse no castling rights (dash)
RegexFenParser.parseFEN with full FEN should set lastMove from en passant field (white to move)
RegexFenParser.parseFEN with full FEN should set lastMove from en passant field (black to move)
RegexFenParser.parseFEN with full FEN should leave lastMove as None when en passant field is dash
RegexFenParser.parseFEN with full FEN should succeed on board-only FEN (no trailing fields)
RegexFenParser.parseFEN with full FEN should succeed when castling and en passant fields are absent
RegexFenParser.parseFEN with full FEN should fail on completely invalid input

RegexFenParser.parseFullFEN should parse black to move
RegexFenParser.parseFullFEN should parse halfmove clock and fullmove number
RegexFenParser.parseFullFEN should default to white to move when side field is missing
RegexFenParser.parseFullFEN should default halfmove clock to 0 when missing
RegexFenParser.parseFullFEN should default fullmove number to 1 when missing
RegexFenParser.parseFullFEN should clamp negative halfmove clock to 0
RegexFenParser.parseFullFEN should clamp fullmove number below 1 to 1
RegexFenParser.parseFullFEN should produce a round-trippable state via FullFen.render
RegexFenParser.parseFullFEN should fail on completely invalid input

RegexFenParser should fail on invalid FEN with wrong square count in rank

RegexFenParser should round-trip FEN: parse and convert back
RegexFenParser should handle FEN with multiple consecutive empty squares

CombinatorPgnParser.save should format moves with move numbers
CombinatorPgnParser.save should handle a single move
CombinatorPgnParser.save should handle an odd number of moves
CombinatorPgnParser.save should return empty string for no moves

CombinatorPgnParser.load should parse moves without move numbers
CombinatorPgnParser.load should strip comments in braces
CombinatorPgnParser.load should strip variations in parentheses
CombinatorPgnParser.load should strip result markers
CombinatorPgnParser.load should strip result marker 0-1
CombinatorPgnParser.load should strip result marker 1/2-1/2
CombinatorPgnParser.load should strip result marker *
CombinatorPgnParser.load should fail on empty input
CombinatorPgnParser.load should fail on input with only move numbers and results
CombinatorPgnParser.load should handle multi-dot move numbers like 1...
CombinatorPgnParser.load should fail on unparseable characters
CombinatorPgnParser.load should produce the same result as PgnFileIO
CombinatorPgnParser round-trip should save then load preserves moves
CombinatorPgnParser round-trip should save then load preserves single move
CombinatorPgnParser as PgnIO should be usable polymorphically

FastParsePgnParser.save should handle a single move

FastParsePgnParser.load should produce the same result as PgnFileIO
FastParsePgnParser round-trip should save then load preserves moves
FastParsePgnParser round-trip should save then load preserves single move
FastParsePgnParser as PgnIO should be usable polymorphically
PGNParser should parse pawn moves
PGNParser should parse knight moves
PGNParser should parse bishop moves
PGNParser should parse queen moves
PGNParser should parse king moves
PGNParser should parse kingside castling
PGNParser should parse queenside castling
PGNParser should parse moves with check symbol
PGNParser should parse moves with checkmate symbol
PGNParser should fail on single invalid character
PGNParser should fail on invalid move format
PGNParser should parse black moves correctly
PGNParser should handle disambiguation with file hint
PGNParser with FEN-initialized boards should parse moves from FEN: after e4 e5
PGNParser with FEN-initialized boards should parse moves from FEN: Italian Game position
PGNParser with FEN-initialized boards should parse queen moves from FEN: Sicilian Defense
PGNParser with FEN-initialized boards should parse bishop moves from FEN: Ruy Lopez
PGNParser with FEN-initialized boards should parse knight moves from FEN: complex position
PGNParser with FEN-initialized boards should parse rook moves from FEN: endgame position
PGNParser with FEN-initialized boards should parse pawn moves from FEN with multiple pawns
PGNParser with FEN-initialized boards should parse black moves from FEN
PGNParser with FEN-initialized boards should parse multiple consecutive moves from FEN
PGNParser with FEN-initialized boards should parse moves from FEN: Scholar's Mate setup
PGNParser with FEN-initialized boards should parse moves from FEN: King and Rook endgame
PGNParser with FEN-initialized boards should parse castling from FEN: kingside castling available
PGNParser with FEN-initialized boards should parse castling from FEN: queenside castling available
PGNParser with FEN-initialized boards should fail to parse invalid move from FEN position
PGNParser with FEN-initialized boards should parse black kingside castling
PGNParser with FEN-initialized boards should parse black queenside castling
PGNParser with FEN-initialized boards should parse castling with numeric notation 0-0
PGNParser with FEN-initialized boards should parse castling with numeric notation 0-0-0
PGNParser with FEN-initialized boards should parse pawn capture move
PGNParser with FEN-initialized boards should parse en passant capture
PGNParser with FEN-initialized boards should parse move with rank hint disambiguation
PGNParser with FEN-initialized boards should parse rook move along rank with path blocked
PGNParser with FEN-initialized boards should parse queen diagonal move from FEN
PGNParser with FEN-initialized boards should parse queen straight move from FEN
PGNParser with FEN-initialized boards should parse black pawn double move
PGNParser with FEN-initialized boards should parse single pawn forward move
PGNParser with FEN-initialized boards should reject rook move to square occupied by own piece
PGNParser with FEN-initialized boards should fail on invalid castling notation
PGNParser with FEN-initialized boards should fail on invalid piece letter in standard move
PGNParser with FEN-initialized boards should fail on invalid target square in standard move
PGNParser.toAlgebraic should convert a pawn move
PGNParser.toAlgebraic should convert a knight move
PGNParser.toAlgebraic should convert a pawn capture
PGNParser.toAlgebraic should convert kingside castling
PGNParser.toAlgebraic should convert queenside castling
PGNParser.toAlgebraic should add + for check
PGNParser.toAlgebraic should add # for checkmate
PGNParser.toAlgebraic should disambiguate with file when two rooks share a rank
PGNParser.toAlgebraic should disambiguate with rank when two rooks share a file
PGNParser.toAlgebraic should convert a king move
PGNParser.toAlgebraic should convert a bishop move
PGNParser.toAlgebraic should convert a queen move
PGNParser.toAlgebraic should add # for castling with checkmate
PGNParser.toAlgebraic should add + for castling with check
PGNParser.toAlgebraic should disambiguate with file and rank when three queens can reach same square
PgnFileIO.save should format moves with move numbers
PgnFileIO.save should handle a single move
PgnFileIO.save should handle an odd number of moves
PgnFileIO.save should return empty string for no moves
PgnFileIO.load should parse moves with move numbers
PgnFileIO.load should parse moves without move numbers
PgnFileIO.load should strip comments in braces
PgnFileIO.load should strip variations in parentheses
PgnFileIO.load should strip result markers
PgnFileIO.load should strip result marker 0-1
PgnFileIO.load should strip result marker 1/2-1/2
PgnFileIO.load should strip result marker *
PgnFileIO.load should fail on empty input
PgnFileIO.load should fail on input with only move numbers and results
PgnFileIO.load should handle multi-dot move numbers like 1...
PgnFileIO round-trip should save then load preserves moves
PgnFileIO round-trip should save then load preserves single move
An initial Board should place kings in the center files
An initial Board should position pawns on the second ranks
An initial Board should leave the middle of the board empty
An initial Board should reject invalid square notation
An initial Board should allow moving a piece to an empty square
An initial Board should allow capturing an opposing piece
Board piece moves should allow valid rook moves on open files
Board piece moves should allow valid rook moves along ranks
Board piece moves should reject rook move to same square
Board piece moves should reject rook move when path is blocked
Board piece moves should allow valid queen diagonal moves
Board piece moves should allow valid queen straight moves
Board piece moves should reject queen L-shape move
Board piece moves should reject queen move to same square
Board piece moves should reject queen move when path is blocked
Board en passant edge cases should not remove captured piece on regular diagonal capture from rank 5
Board en passant edge cases should not trigger en passant on forward pawn move from rank 5
Board en passant edge cases should reject en passant when last move distance is wrong from starting rank
Board en passant edge cases should reject en passant when pawn is not on correct rank
Board en passant edge cases should reject en passant when last move was not a 2-square pawn advance
Board en passant edge cases should reject en passant when last move target is on wrong rank
Board en passant edge cases should reject en passant when last move file doesn't match target
Board en passant edge cases should reject en passant when there is no last move
Board en passant edge cases should reject en passant when captured piece is not a pawn
Board.applyMoveUnchecked should return same board when source square is empty
Board.toString should display the initial board in a readable format
Board.toString should display moved pieces correctly
Board.toString should have multiple lines for each rank
Castling should execute white kingside castling — king to g1, rook to f1
Castling should execute white queenside castling — king to c1, rook to d1
Castling should execute black kingside castling — king to g8, rook to f8
Castling should execute black queenside castling — king to c8, rook to d8
Castling should revoke both castling rights after king moves
Castling should revoke only kingside right after h-rook moves
Castling should revoke only queenside right after a-rook moves
Castling should reject castling after king has moved
Castling should reject castling when rook is absent
Castling should reject castling when path is blocked
Castling should reject castling when king is in check
Castling should reject castling when king passes through check
findKing should find white king on initial board
findKing should find black king on initial board
findKing should find king on a custom position
findKing should return None when no king is present
isAttackedBy should detect pawn attack from white
isAttackedBy should not detect pawn attack straight ahead
isAttackedBy should detect pawn attack from black
isAttackedBy should detect knight attack
isAttackedBy should detect bishop attack
isAttackedBy should detect rook attack
isAttackedBy should detect queen attack on diagonal
isAttackedBy should detect queen attack on rank
isAttackedBy should detect king attack
isAttackedBy should not detect attack through blocking piece
isInCheck should return false for initial position
isInCheck should detect check by rook
isInCheck should detect check by bishop
isInCheck should detect check by knight
isInCheck should detect check by pawn
isInCheck should detect check by queen
isInCheck should not detect check when line is blocked
isInCheck should return false when no king present
move with check validation should reject a move that leaves own king in check
move with check validation should allow a move that does not leave king in check
move with check validation should reject a king move into check
move with check validation should allow a king move out of check
move with check validation should allow capturing the checking piece
move with check validation should allow blocking a check
isCheckmate should detect back-rank mate
isCheckmate should detect scholar's mate pattern
isCheckmate should not report checkmate when king can escape
isCheckmate should not report checkmate when not in check
isCheckmate should not report checkmate when check can be blocked
isStalemate should detect stalemate when king has no legal moves
isStalemate should not report stalemate for initial position
isStalemate should not report stalemate when in check
legalMoves should have moves for both sides from initial position
legalMoves should have exactly 20 opening moves for white
legalMoves should have no legal moves in checkmate
legalMoves should have no legal moves in stalemate
legalMoves should only include moves that don't leave king in check
En Passant Capture when white pawn captures black pawn should allow en passant capture when opponent pawn moves 2 squares
En Passant Capture when white pawn captures black pawn should allow en passant capture on queenside
En Passant Capture when black pawn captures white pawn should allow black en passant capture
En Passant Capture when invalid en passant scenarios should not allow en passant if opponent pawn moved 1 square
En Passant Capture when invalid en passant scenarios should not allow en passant if not immediately after 2-square move
En Passant Capture when edge cases should only allow en passant on pawns
Illegal Move Detection when testing pawn moves should reject pawn moving 2 squares diagonally (e2d4)
Illegal Move Detection when testing pawn moves should reject pawn moving backwards
Illegal Move Detection when testing pawn moves should reject pawn moving 3 squares
Illegal Move Detection when testing pawn moves should allow pawn moving 2 squares from starting position
Illegal Move Detection when testing pawn moves should reject pawn moving 2 squares from non-starting position
Illegal Move Detection when testing pawn moves should reject pawn moving to occupied square
Illegal Move Detection when testing pawn moves should allow pawn capturing diagonally
Illegal Move Detection when testing pawn moves should reject pawn capturing non-diagonally
Illegal Move Detection when testing knight moves should reject knight moving in straight line
Illegal Move Detection when testing bishop moves should reject bishop moving in straight line
Illegal Move Detection when testing rook moves should reject rook moving diagonally
Illegal Move Detection when testing queen moves should reject queen moving in L-shape
Illegal Move Detection when testing king moves should reject king moving 2 squares
Illegal Move Detection when testing king moves should reject white king teleporting from e1 to h8 even if black rook is there
Illegal Move Detection when testing king moves should reject white king teleporting from e1 to h1 (rook square)
Illegal Move Detection when testing king moves should reject black king teleporting from e8 to h1 even if white rook is there
Illegal Move Detection when testing king moves should reject white king moving to a non-adjacent, non-castling square (e1 to a8)
Illegal Move Detection when testing king moves should still allow normal kingside castling (e1 to g1)
Illegal Move Detection when testing king moves should legalMoves must not include king teleport from e1 to h8
Illegal Move Detection when testing king moves should reject white king capturing adjacent black king (e6 takes f7)
Illegal Move Detection when testing king moves should reject white king capturing adjacent black king (d5 takes e5)
Illegal Move Detection when testing king moves should reject black king capturing adjacent white king (e5 takes d5)
Illegal Move Detection when testing king moves should legalMoves must not include white king capturing the black king
Illegal Move Detection when testing board boundaries should reject invalid square coordinates
Illegal Move Detection when testing capture rules should reject capturing own piece
MoveResult.Moved should report isSuccess as true
MoveResult.Moved should report isFailed as false
MoveResult.Moved should return the board via get
MoveResult.Moved should return the board via getOrElse, ignoring default
MoveResult.Moved should convert to Some via toOption
MoveResult.Moved should return the event via event
MoveResult.Moved should use default gameEvent of GameEvent.Moved
MoveResult.Moved should apply f in foreach
MoveResult.Moved should transform the board via map
MoveResult.Moved should chain via flatMap
MoveResult.Failed should report isSuccess as false
MoveResult.Failed should report isFailed as true
MoveResult.Failed should throw NoSuchElementException on get
MoveResult.Failed should return the default via getOrElse
MoveResult.Failed should convert to None via toOption
MoveResult.Failed should return None via event
MoveResult.Failed should return None via movedOption
MoveResult.Failed should not apply f in foreach
MoveResult.Failed should return itself on map (short-circuit)
MoveResult.Failed should return itself on flatMap (short-circuit)
MoveResult for-comprehension should chain successful moves
MoveResult for-comprehension should short-circuit on first failure
MoveResult game events should detect check
MoveResult game events should detect checkmate
MoveResult game events should detect stalemate
MoveResult game events should report Moved for normal moves
MoveError should provide NoPiece message
MoveError should provide InvalidMove message
MoveError should provide LeavesKingInCheck message
MoveError should provide WrongColor message
MoveError should provide ParseError message
Opening.apply should create a valid Opening
Opening.apply should reject invalid ECO code format
Opening.apply should reject ECO code with wrong length
Opening.apply should reject empty name
Opening.apply should reject empty moves
Opening.apply should reject empty FEN
Opening.apply should reject non-positive move count
Opening.apply should accept all valid ECO letters A through E
Opening.unsafe should create an Opening without validation
Opening case class should support equality by value
Opening case class should produce a useful toString
Opening case class should support copy
PersistedGame.create should create a game with default values
PersistedGame.create should generate unique IDs for separate calls
PersistedGame.create should create a game with custom FEN history and moves
PersistedGame.create should create a game with custom status
PersistedGame case class should support copy with result
PersistedGame case class should support equality by value
Piece.toString should use unicode glyphs for all white pieces
Piece.toString should use unicode glyphs for all black pieces
Piece.toString should differ between white and black glyphs for each piece type
Piece.toString should always produce a single-character glyph
Color should have exactly two values
Color should fold to the correct value for White
Color should fold to the correct value for Black
Color should return the opposite color
Color should be its own double opposite
Role should have exactly six values
Role should provide all roles via Role.all
Role should report King and Pawn as non-promotable
Role should report Queen, Rook, Bishop, Knight as promotable
Role should have distinct white and black symbols for each role
PromotableRole should have exactly four values
PromotableRole should provide all via PromotableRole.all
PromotableRole should convert to the corresponding Role
PromotableRole should round-trip from Role and back
PromotableRole should return None for non-promotable roles
File should have correct index and letter for all files
File should compute difference between files
File should offset to a valid file
File should offset to None for out-of-range
File should construct from valid Int
File should return None from invalid Int
File should construct from valid Char (lowercase)
File should construct from valid Char (uppercase)
File should return None from invalid Char
File should contain all 8 files in order
Rank should have correct index for all ranks
Rank should compute difference between ranks
Rank should offset to a valid rank
Rank should offset to None for out-of-range
Rank should construct from valid Int
Rank should return None from invalid Int
Rank should contain all 8 ranks in order
Square should display as algebraic notation via toString
Square should construct from valid algebraic notation string
Square should throw on invalid notation string
Square should construct from valid coords via fromCoords
Square should return None from invalid coords
Square should return None from fromCoords with invalid file but valid rank
Square should return None from fromCoords with valid file but invalid rank
Square should construct from valid string via fromString
Square should return None from fromString with wrong length
Square should return None from fromString with invalid file char
Square should return None from fromString with invalid rank char
Square should have all 64 squares
Square should have all squares in rank-major order
Square should roundtrip through toString and fromString
Square should roundtrip through fromCoords and index accessors
Square should support equality via case class
OpeningRepository default arguments should dispatch omitted limits and offsets through the trait defaults
GameRepository default arguments should dispatch omitted limits and offsets through the trait defaults
constructor defaults should start empty when no initial openings are provided
save should insert a new opening
save should overwrite an existing opening with the same (eco, name)
saveAll should insert multiple openings and return count
saveAll should deduplicate by (eco, name) on repeated saveAll
findByEco should return all openings for the given ECO code sorted by name
findByEco should return empty list for unknown ECO
findByEcoAndName should return Some for an existing opening
findByEcoAndName should return None for unknown (eco, name)
findByName should match case-insensitively
findByName should return all matches up to limit
findByName should return empty list when nothing matches
findAll should return openings sorted by (eco, name)
findAll should respect limit and offset for pagination
findAll should return empty list when offset exceeds size
findAll should use default limit and offset when called with no arguments
findByMoveCount should return openings with moveCount <= maxMoves
findByMoveCount should respect limit
findRandom should return None when empty
findRandom should return Some when non-empty
findByFen should return the matching opening for an indexed FEN
findByFen should return None when the FEN is unknown
count should return 0 for empty repository
count should return correct count
deleteAll should remove all openings and return count
deleteAll should return 0 for empty repository
fromLichess should load all Lichess openings from TSV resources
fromLichess should provide documented black opening moves through the strategy
save should insert a new game and return it
save should upsert on duplicate id
save should persist optional opening info
findById should return None for unknown id
findById should attempt find for existing id (exercises findById code path)
findAll should return games with limit and offset
findAll should use default parameters when called with no arguments
findByStatus should return only games matching status
findByOpening should return games by ECO code
findByOpening should return empty for unknown ECO
delete should return false for unknown id
delete should exercise delete code path for known id
count should return correct count
deleteAll should remove all games and return count
save should insert a new opening and return it
save should upsert on duplicate (eco, name)
saveAll should bulk insert and return count
saveAll should return 0 for empty list
findByEco should return all openings for the ECO code sorted by name
findByEco should return empty list for unknown ECO
findByEcoAndName should return Some for an existing opening
findByEcoAndName should return None for unknown
findByName should match by name regex
findByName should respect limit
findByName should use the default limit when omitted
findAll should return openings in ECO order with limit/offset
findAll should use default parameters when called with no arguments
findByMoveCount should filter by maxMoves
findByMoveCount should use the default limit when omitted
findRandom should return None when empty
findRandom should return Some when non-empty
count should return correct count
findByFen should return the matching opening when present
findByFen should return None for an unknown FEN
stored openings should be usable by the opening continuation strategy for black moves
deleteAll should remove all documents and return count
createTable / createIndexes should be idempotent

save should upsert on duplicate id
save should persist a game with optional opening info

findById should return Some for existing id

findAll should use default parameters when omitted
findByStatus should return only games with matching status
findByStatus should use the default limit when omitted
findByOpening should return games by ECO code
findByOpening should return empty for unknown ECO
findByOpening should use the default limit when omitted
delete should remove the game and return true
delete should return false for unknown id
count should return correct number of games
deleteAll should remove all games and return count
createTable / createIndexes should create the schema (idempotent)
save should insert a new opening and return it
save should upsert on duplicate (eco, name)
saveAll should bulk insert and return count

findByEco should return empty list for unknown ECO

findByEcoAndName should return None for unknown

findByName should respect limit

findRandom should return Some when non-empty

stored openings should be usable by the opening continuation strategy for black moves

GameEventRoutes should return health status
GameEventRoutes should accept a posted event and return 202
GameEventRoutes should publish a posted event to subscribers
GameEventRoutes should reject unknown routes with 404
GameEventRoutes should emit heartbeat frames for websocket subscribers
HttpGameEventPublisher should post events to the realtime service
InMemoryGameEventHub should deliver a published event to a subscriber
InMemoryGameEventHub should isolate events by game ID
InMemoryGameEventHub should fan-out a single event to multiple subscribers for the same game
InMemoryGameEventHub should allow a topic to be cleared and recreated for the same game id
OpeningSeeder.seedLichessOpenings should seed all openings into a repository
OpeningSeeder.seedFromTsvResource should seed openings from a single TSV resource
OpeningSeeder.seedFromTsvResource should return 0 for a TSV resource with no valid lines
OpeningSeeder.seedFromTsvResource should fail for a missing resource
OpeningSeeder.seedFromCsvResource should seed openings from a CSV resource
OpeningSeeder.seedFromCsvResource should return 0 for a header-only CSV resource
ConsoleView.showBoard should render ranks and files with coordinate labels
ConsoleView.showWelcome should provide a welcome message
ConsoleView.update should print the board and a status line on a Moved event
ConsoleView.update should print an error message on a Failed event
ConsoleView handles game events should announce check
ConsoleView handles game events should announce checkmate (Black wins when White to move)
ConsoleView handles game events should announce checkmate (White wins when Black to move)
ConsoleView handles game events should announce stalemate
ConsoleView handles game events should announce threefold repetition
ConsoleView.parseMove should parse valid coordinate notation
ConsoleView.parseMove should parse coordinate notation with promotion
ConsoleView.parseMove should parse promotion to Rook
ConsoleView.parseMove should parse promotion to Bishop
ConsoleView.parseMove should parse promotion to Knight
ConsoleView.parseMove should parse promotion with unknown piece as None
ConsoleView.parseMove should return None for a move string that is too short
ConsoleView.parseMove should return None for an invalid square
ConsoleView.promptForMove should return the trimmed input
ConsoleView.promptForMove should throw NullPointerException when stdin is closed
ConsoleView.run should exit cleanly on 'quit' input
ConsoleView.run should exit cleanly on 'exit' input
ConsoleView.run should apply a valid PGN move and continue
ConsoleView.run should apply a valid coordinate move
ConsoleView.run should handle an invalid move format
ConsoleView.run should handle PromotionRequired error via PGN path
ConsoleView.run should exercise coordinate path when PGN fails (rook move looks like pawn move)
ConsoleView.run should exercise PGN-success-but-model-rejects path (pinned piece)
ConsoleView.promptForPromotion should return Queen for Q input
ConsoleView.promptForPromotion should return Rook for ROOK input
ConsoleView.promptForPromotion should return Bishop for B input
ConsoleView.promptForPromotion should return Knight for KNIGHT input
ConsoleView.promptForPromotion should default to Queen for unknown input
ConsoleView.promptForPromotion should return None when input stream is closed
SessionMovePublicationGate should publish local moves by default
SessionMovePublicationGate should suppress the next observed move after a remote move is marked
SessionMovePublicationGate should resume publishing after consuming a remote move
SessionMovePublicationGate should queue multiple remote moves independently
CirceJsonFileIO should round-trip the initial board
CirceJsonFileIO should round-trip an empty board
CirceJsonFileIO should round-trip a board with lastMove set
CirceJsonFileIO should round-trip a board without lastMove
CirceJsonFileIO should round-trip a FEN-loaded mid-game position
CirceJsonFileIO should preserve all piece types and colors
CirceJsonFileIO should produce valid JSON containing expected keys
CirceJsonFileIO should fail on invalid JSON input
CirceJsonFileIO should fail on empty input
CirceJsonFileIO should fail on valid JSON but wrong structure
CirceJsonFileIO should fail on JSON with invalid color
CirceJsonFileIO should fail on JSON with invalid role
CirceJsonFileIO should fail on JSON with invalid square in lastMove
CirceJsonFileIO should round-trip a board after several moves
CirceJsonFileIO should be usable through the FileIO interface
UPickleJsonFileIO should round-trip the initial board
UPickleJsonFileIO should round-trip an empty board
UPickleJsonFileIO should round-trip a board with lastMove set

UPickleJsonFileIO should preserve all piece types and colors
UPickleJsonFileIO should produce valid JSON containing expected keys

UPickleJsonFileIO should fail on JSON with invalid color
UPickleJsonFileIO should fail on JSON with invalid role
UPickleJsonFileIO should fail on JSON with invalid square in lastMove
UPickleJsonFileIO should round-trip a board after several moves
UPickleJsonFileIO should be usable through the FileIO interface
UPickleJsonFileIO should produce JSON compatible with Circe implementation
GET /health should return 200 with service name
POST /games should create a new default game and return 200
POST /games should create a game from a custom FEN
POST /games should return 400 for an invalid FEN
GET /games/:id should return game state for a valid game
GET /games/:id should return 404 for unknown game
DELETE /games/:id should delete a game and return 204
DELETE /games/:id should return 404 for unknown game
POST /games/:id/moves should apply a valid move and return 200
POST /games/:id/moves should return 400 for an illegal move
POST /games/:id/moves should return 400 for unknown game
GET /games/:id/moves should return move history
GET /games/:id/moves should return 404 for unknown game
GET /games/:id/fen should return FEN for existing game
GET /games/:id/fen should return 404 for unknown game
POST /games/:id/fen should load a valid FEN and return 200
POST /games/:id/fen should return 400 for invalid FEN
POST /games/:id/fen should return 400 for unknown game
GET /health should return 200 with gateway service name
proxy routes should forward POST /api/games to game service
proxy routes should forward GET /api/games/some-id to game service
proxy routes should forward DELETE /api/games/some-id to game service
proxy routes should forward GET / to UI service
proxy routes should forward GET /some/path to UI service
buildTargetUri should build a URI from base and path
buildTargetUri should append a query string when provided
buildTargetUri should omit query string when None
buildTargetUri should work with nested paths
proxy should forward a request and return the backend response
CreateGameRequest should use None as the default start FEN
CreateGameRequest should round-trip through JSON with None
CreateGameRequest should round-trip through JSON with Some FEN
CreateGameResponse should round-trip through JSON
GameStateResponse should round-trip through JSON
MakeMoveRequest should round-trip through JSON
MakeMoveResponse should round-trip through JSON with no event
MakeMoveResponse should round-trip through JSON with an event
MakeMoveResponse should round-trip with success=false
MoveHistoryResponse should round-trip through JSON with moves
MoveHistoryResponse should round-trip through JSON with empty moves
FenResponse should round-trip through JSON
LoadFenRequest should round-trip through JSON
LoadFenResponse should round-trip through JSON success=true
LoadFenResponse should round-trip through JSON success=false
ErrorResponse should use None as the default details value
ErrorResponse should round-trip through JSON with no details
ErrorResponse should round-trip through JSON with details
OpeningLookupResponse should round-trip through JSON
HealthResponse should round-trip through JSON
GET /health should return 200 with ui-service name
GET / should respond (200 if file exists, 404 otherwise)
GET /nonexistent-file-xyz.html should return 404
GET /some/file.js should return 404 for a non-existent JS file
